headline: Citi Calls AMD a Rising Force in the GPU Market, Upgrades Shares to Buy
summary: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) is included among Billionaire Larry Robbins’ 10 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 12, Citi upgraded Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) to Buy from Neutral. It also raised the firm’s price target to $575 from $460. The firm believes the upside from AMD’s graphics processing unit business is not fully reflected […]

headline: Meta Completes Operational Split from Manus amid Unwinding of $2 Billion Deal, Bloomberg Reports

The move marks a significant step toward unwinding a $2 billion acquisition that Beijing has opposed. […]

headline: Anthropic Block Marks US Reversal, Warning to Silicon Valley

headline: SHOPADOC® FOUNDER WELCOMES A NATIONAL DISCUSSION ON DENTAL FEE TRANSPARENCY, CARE AFFORDABILITY AND ACCESS TO TREATMENT
summary: Florida dentist Dr. Jeffrey A. Molloy, founder of ShopADoc.com, will showcase the ShopADoc® platform at the Florida State Dental Meeting at Gaylord Palms Resort & Convention Center June 25–27, 2026, while continuing an ongoing public discussion surrounding dental affordability, insurance restrictions, delayed treatment decisions, and the growing financial complexity associated with modern dentistry.

headline: SpaceX stock gains: What its IPO signals about its future success
summary: SpaceX stock (SPCX) continues rising in Monday's pre-market trading (maintaining gains at the session open at the time of this video's posting) ahead of the space company's first full day of trading since its historic IPO last Friday. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Barron's Investor Circle Newsletter editor Josh Schafer examine SpaceX's performance thus far and what it may signal about the success of the company in its future lifetime.

content.title: SpaceX stock gains: What its IPO signals about its future success
content.description:
SpaceX stock (SPCX) continues rising in Monday's pre-market trading (maintaining gains at the session open at the time of this video's posting) ahead of the space company's first full day of trading since its historic IPO last Friday.

Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Barron's Investor Circle Newsletter editor Josh Schafer examine SpaceX's performance thus far and what it may signal about the success of the company in its future lifetime.

headline: If You Put $500 a Month into This Tech ETF Since 2016, You Could Retire Tomorrow
summary: Drop $500 into the VanEck Semiconductor ETF (NYSEARCA:SMH) starting in June, 2016, add another $500 every month, and the math pegs the account at $495,000 this week. Total contributions across those ten years come to $60,500. Everything else is what a single-sector ETF did to your money while you ignored it. The math holds up ... headline: Wolfe Research sees substantial upside to AMD estimates
summary: Investing.com -- On Monday, analysts at Wolfe Research described management's tone on a pre-quiet period call with AMD as constructive, saying there is "substantial room for upside to consensus for both CY26 and 27" driven by incremental CPU strength and the potential for additional gigawatt-scale MI450 customers.

headline: Is AMD the Next $1 Trillion Chip Stock, or Just the Next AI Trap?
